name: Temple of Malice
oracle_text:
Temple of Malice enters the battlefield tapped.
When Temple of Malice enters the battlefield, scry 1.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.
design_notes: A scry land demonstrating land card patterns: (1) lands have no mana_cost (null) and 0 cmc, (2) colors is empty (lands are colorless) but color_identity includes the colors they produce, (3) ETB tapped is the standard drawback for dual lands at uncommon, (4) scry 1 as an ETB trigger provides card selection to compensate for the tempo loss, (5) the tap ability uses {T} symbol followed by mana production. Clean dual land design at the right power level for uncommon.
